items.name: Alien
items.description:
Visit us for more cool stuff!  https://www.roblox.com/groups/34376130/Metaskins-Creations-UGC#!/about
Explore the Galaxy with the Ultimate Alien Costume! 

Get ready to take your Roblox adventures out of this world with this awesome alien costume! Perfect for space explorers, sci-fi fans, and anyone who loves to imagine life beyond Earth. This cool outfit features glowing eyes, extraterrestrial details, and a futuristic vibe that will make you stand out in any game. Whether you’re flying a UFO or just hanging out with your intergalactic friends, this alien costume is a must-have for all adventurers!

items.name: CoppaFeel! Black Full Print Fruit Sweatpants
items.description: CoppaFeel! Fruit emoji repeat print black sweatpants. From Coconuts to Blueberries only available in limited numbers via the CoppaFeel! Store, designed exclusively for Roblox. All profits from the sale of this item go to the CoppaFeel! charity. Match it with the Emoji Print Sweatshirt to complete the look!

items.name: Flannel Wide-Leg Pant
items.description: Designed for a tailored drape, these Italian stretch-wool flannel pants unite a high-rise waist and wide-leg silhouette. Pressed creases and folded cuffs complete the look.
